tools.name: factory_predict_vault_address
tools.description: Predict vault address for given params without sending a transaction.

tools.name: factory_create_vault_prepare
tools.description: Prepare createVault transaction request (to/data/value=0). MCP MUST NOT send unless explicitly enabled.

tools.name: agent_account_context_create
tools.description: Create and normalize a reusable agent account context that binds agent, vault, executor and default funding settings.

tools.name: agent_funding_policy_create
tools.description: Create and normalize a reusable funding policy for agent-managed asset transfers.

tools.name: vault_bootstrap
tools.description: High-level vault bootstrap orchestration that prepares or executes first-time vault setup and returns reusable config artifacts.

healthCheckBlockTag.description: "latest", a decimal block number string, or a 0x-prefixed hex block number string

tools.name: agent_build_fund_and_action_plan
tools.description: Build a two-step agent plan that optionally funds a target account from the vault before running a follow-up action.

tools.name: agent_fund_and_action_session_create
tools.description: Create a resumable execution session from a normalized fund-and-action plan.

tools.name: agent_fund_and_action_session_apply_event
tools.description: Apply a state transition event to an existing fund-and-action execution session.

tools.name: agent_fund_and_action_session_next_step
tools.description: Resolve the normalized next execution task for a fund-and-action session without invoking external executors.

tools.name: agent_follow_up_action_result_create
tools.description: Normalize a follow-up action execution result envelope without invoking the real downstream executor.

tools.name: vault_asset_transfer_result_create
tools.description: Normalize an onchain asset transfer execution result envelope without invoking a real transaction sender.

tools.name: vault_health_check
tools.description: Read vault health/state snapshot at a specific block (or latest).

blockTag.description: "latest", a decimal block number string, or a 0x-prefixed hex block number string

tools.name: vault_check_nonce
tools.description: Check if a mandate nonce has been used for a given authority on a vault.

tools.name: mandate_check_revoked
tools.description: Check if a mandate hash has been revoked.

tools.name: mandate_build_sign_request
tools.description: Build canonical mandate + typed data for authority to sign. MCP MUST NOT sign for authority.

tools.name: vault_build_asset_transfer_plan
tools.description: Build a canonical ERC20 transfer plan via vault.execute without requiring signature/proofs yet.

tools.name: vault_check_asset_transfer_policy
tools.description: Preflight-check whether a proposed ERC20 transfer complies with a funding policy.

tools.name: vault_build_asset_transfer_plan_from_context
tools.description: Build a canonical ERC20 transfer plan using a pre-bound agent account context and its defaults.

tools.name: vault_simulate_asset_transfer
tools.description: Build and simulate an ERC20 transfer via vault.execute with provided signature and adapter proofs.

tools.name: vault_simulate_asset_transfer_from_context
tools.description: Build and simulate an ERC20 transfer using a pre-bound agent account context and provided signature/proofs.

tools.name: vault_prepare_asset_transfer
tools.description: Build and prepare an ERC20 transfer via vault.execute with provided signature and adapter proofs.

tools.name: vault_prepare_asset_transfer_from_context
tools.description: Build and prepare an ERC20 transfer using a pre-bound agent account context and provided signature/proofs.

tools.name: vault_execute_asset_transfer
tools.description: Build, prepare, broadcast and normalize an ERC20 transfer via vault.execute using the runtime executor signer.

tools.name: vault_execute_asset_transfer_from_context
tools.description: Build, prepare, broadcast and normalize an ERC20 transfer using a pre-bound agent account context and runtime executor signer.

tools.name: vault_simulate_execute
tools.description: Simulate execute call (eth_call) with given mandate/signature/actions/proofs and executor as from.

tools.name: vault_execute_prepare
tools.description: Prepare execute transaction request (to/data/value=0).

tools.name: vault_revoke_mandate_prepare
tools.description: Prepare revokeMandate transaction request (authority-only).

tools.name: vault_invalidate_nonce_prepare
tools.description: Prepare invalidateNonce transaction request (authority-only).
